case_title: ALEJO-MAGALLON, JAVIER vs. SANTIAGO, RAUL JR. et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-22-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-22-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAR-25-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-24-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 3RD ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE: AS TO WHY PLAINTIFF HAS NOT COMPLIED WITH COURT RULES. IF NO APPEARANCE AND/OR GOOD CAUSE COURT MAY DISMISS CASE.(ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF 4/24/96 IS HEREBY DISCHARGED) HEARING SET FOR MAY-23-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-23-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, 4TH ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO PLAINTIFF AS TO WHY NO PROOF OF SERVICE OR SUBSTITUTION OF COUNSEL FILED. IF NO POS OR SUBSTITUTION OF COUNSEL FILED, & NO GOOD CAUSE, COURT WILL DISMISS CASE. HEARING SET FOR JUN-24-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-25-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), CONTINUED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE: PREVIOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS HEREBY DISCHARGED. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE IF SERVED. HEARING SET FOR APR-24-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-24-1996, DISMISSAL DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR FAILURE TO TIMELY PROSECUTE AND TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULES.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALEJO-MAGALLON, JAVIER AS TO DEFENDANT SANTIAGO, RAUL JR. DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-22-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-26-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-02-1996
